## Forum Threads

Velop/velo-4Ajay Kumar•

3d ago

### Every rebrand tells a story. Here’s ours. [...] We re listening. [...] So we went back and started reworking how we think about voice cloning at Velo. Not just matching how you sound, but capturing how you express. The way your voice changes when you re explaining something, when you re just talking casually, or when you actually care about what you re saying.  
That s what we re building now. The next version of Velo is focused on higher fidelity voice cloning. More nuance. Better pacing. More natural expression.  
Something that doesn t feel like a generated voice reading your script, but closer to you actually speaking.  
We re still building it, but it s coming together fast. We re planning to ship this soon.  
If you ve used Velo before, we d love to know - what do you think about Velo's voice cloning or other workflows? What would make it feel right?

## FAQs

Try for Free

### 

Velo is an AI video platform - video infrastructure for work. It turns company context, source artifacts, and workflow intent into clear videos for demos, support, onboarding, training, and sales.

### 

A video editor helps you change a video after it exists. Velo helps create, update, translate, host, and distribute video from company knowledge. It is a system, not just an editing surface.

### 

You can create product demos, support explainers, customer onboarding videos, employee training, SOPs, compliance videos, changelog videos, release note videos, and agent-generated videos.

results.title: How AI Video Turns Sales Enablement Content Into a Revenue Engine that Scales | Vyond
results.content:
Updated March 2026: This post explores how AI sales enablement tools — especially AI video platforms like Vyond — help teams create scalable, personalized sales enablement content that helps reps ramp faster; handle objections better; and speed up revenue velocity at every stage of the sales cycle. Featuring real-world examples from Salesloft and Vyond, this article outlines how AI video platforms can power sales enablement content strategies that generate effective onboarding, training, and outreach at scale, 5x faster than traditional tools.

Limited bandwidth and production bottlenecks make it hard for many sales enablement teams to deliver the content sellers need to show up informed, confident and ready to win. [...] Vyond Logo
Vyond Logo

Vyond is the #1 enterprise-ready video creation platform. Companies worldwide use Vyond to easily create engaging videos in minutes, helping them sell, train, and educate more quickly and effectively.

© 2026 GoAnimate, Inc. All Rights Reserved. VYOND™ is a trademark of GoAnimate, Inc., registered in Argentina, Australia, Brazil, Canada, Chile, Egypt, the European Union, Hong Kong, India, Indonesia, Israel, Japan, Malaysia, Mexico, New Zealand, Norway, OAPI, the Philippines, Russia, Singapore, Switzerland, Thailand, Turkey, the United Kingdom, and Vietnam; Reg. U.S. Pat. & Tm. Off. Other names and marks are the property of their respective holders. [...] Videos made in Vyond played a central role in two recent sales training initiatives at Salesloft.

In just a few weeks, Joel and his team (none of whom had video creation experience) created an introductory explainer video for a new product launch and a series of quick-hit videos for ongoing support.  
  
Explainer video: Democratizing AI Agents

For Salesloft’s AI agents launch, Joel used animated videos made in Vyond to simplify a complex concept into a memorable analogy.

The result? A polished, engaging video that helped reps communicate value clearly, reduce friction in buyer conversations and help deals move faster.

Quick-hit product intros: SalesSpark Series

The team also created short-form AI avatar videos to help sellers quickly absorb new messaging and features.

results.title: How to sell your video content for AI training data | Versos AI posted on the topic | LinkedIn
results.content: business using Sora 2 commercially carries legal liability. Infrastructure reality: Current systems can't handle scale. Users report being "cut off from a product for 12 plus hours" with "drinks and drabs of availability."Generation quality degrades during high demand. Third-party API access costs $0.15-$0.16 per video through unofficial channels. True production deployment requires compute monitoring, retry logic, and 10% buffer for failed generations. What this means for builders: The technology works. The product doesn't exist yet. If you need AI video generation for production systems today, you're looking at RunwayML, Google Veo 3, or other alternatives with actual APIs and predictable access. Sora 2's physics improvements are impressive, but the implementation gap between demo and [...] production. 5. OpenAI’s Sora 2 Storyboard: Expands to 25-second videos for Pro users, with a frame-by-frame timeline for unique prompts per segment. Insight: Provides precise creative control, turning vague ideas into detailed narratives,revolutionizing video production for filmmakers and content creators. 6. Microsoft’s MAI-Image-1: Microsoft’s first in-house AI image generator, debuting in the top 10 on LMArena benchmarks for high-quality, photorealistic outputs. Insight: Signals Microsoft’s push into generative AI, offering a competitive alternative for designers and enterprises seeking integrated, reliable visual tools. 7. NVIDIA’s DGX Spark: The world’s smallest AI supercomputer, delivering 1 petaflop in a desktop form for $3,999, with 128GB unified memory for running 200B parameter [...] I’ve been hearing a lot about Sora lately — the new AI video tool by OpenAI — but haven’t tried it firsthand yet. I’ve been slowly trying my hands on different AI content creation tools — from ElevenLabs for voiceovers, to Descript for editing, and HeyGen for AI-driven videos. It’s been fascinating to see how fast this space is evolving and how creators can start building more efficiently than ever. Here’s what I’ve learned so far from my research (and from experimenting with other tools): 🔍 Tips for using AI for content • Start with small, simple prompts — don’t try to force too many ideas at once. • Use remix, recut, and blend features — generate multiple versions and pick the best. • Begin with lower-resolution, shorter clips to test your vision. • Think like a director: add camera

results.title: How to Supercharge Your Enablement and Help Sales Win With AI Video Creation - Training Industry, Inc.
results.content:
# Training Industry, Inc. Training Industry

Training Industry

# How to Supercharge Your Enablement and Help Sales Win With AI Video Creation

Join Vyond sales enablement leader, Lauren Nisbet, and Salesloft’s director of field readiness, Joel Fleet, for a thoughtful discussion about the ways leading artificial intelligence (AI) video creation platforms can help strapped sales enablement teams quickly deliver high-quality training on a deadline.

In this session, Joel will explain how instant video tools and templates — as well as a tiered content request menu — are helping his enablement “pit crew” streamline content creation and drive new business. Plus, he’ll share examples of recent videos his team made that delivered amazing results.

Join this session to learn:

View full agenda.
